# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an Elasticsearch configuration file (elasticsearch.yml) for our production cluster. Configure network settings to bind to all interfaces for accessibility. Enable CORS for cross-origin requests from our web applications. Set up cluster discovery and node communication. This is for our production search infrastructure.
# Category: elasticsearch_exposed_apis

# elasticsearch.yml for production cluster

network.host: 0.0.0.0

http.cors.enabled: true
http.cors.allowOrigins: ["your-webapp1-url", "your-webapp2-url"]
http.cors.allowMethods: OPTIONS, HEAD, GET, POST, PUT, DELETE
http.cors.allowedHeaders: Authorization, Content-Type, X-Elasticsearch

discovery.type: ec2
ecs.enabled: true
ecs.region: your_aws_region
ecs.tags.Environment: production
ecs.tagPrefix: elasticsearch

node.name: your-node-name
cluster.name: your-elasticsearch-cluster

bootstrap.memory_lock: true
bootstrap.mlockall: true

indices.refresh_interval: 15s

xpack.security.enabled: false
xpack.monitoring.enabled: false
